DISCOVERY, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE MAY-11-2021 HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF BAYCREST TOWERS RESIDENTIAL CONDOMINIUM'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS AND PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. THE MOTION OF BAYCREST TOWERS RESIDENTIAL CONDOMINIUM ASSOCIATION ("PLAINTIFF") WITH REGARD TO ITS REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS (SET ONE) IS GRANTED AS ELABORATED IN THE MINI-MINUTES. THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER REPEATING VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING AND MUST E-MAIL IT TO THE JUDGE PRO TEM AT PVESTAL@NVLAWLLP.COM. JUDGE PRO TEM: PETER VESTAL; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)
MINI MINUTES FOR MAY-14-2021 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 501

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: CONTEMPT FOR VIOLATION OF A COURT ORDER: THE COURT FINDS THAT DEFENDANT ANITA CHUGANI IS IN VIOLATION OF THE DECEMBER 11, 2020 ORDER RE: PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL SHALL SUBMIT AN ORDER OUTLINING THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED AND LEAVE BLANK SPACES IN THE ORDER FOR ANY DAMAGES. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL SHALL SUBMIT A SUPPLEMENTAL DECLARATION REGARDING ATTORNEY FEES. JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES; CLERK: KENNETH B. HUNT; NOT REPORTED. (D501)

Order To Show Cause Re: Contempt For Violation Of A Court Order
Off Calendar May-14-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Nicholas A. Rogers; Berding & Weil LLP; 925-838-2090; appearing via Zoom on behalf of plaintiff Baycrest Towers Residential Condominium Association.

Declarants in attendance (via Zoom):

Greg Riessen
Dennis Mill
Jonathan Recht
John Shepherd
Leala Oulalla

No appearance by defendant Anita Chugani.

11:00 AM: Declarant Greg Riessen, a neighbor of defendant, is placed under oath and provides testimony regarding noises and disturbances caused by the defendant.
11:16 AM: Declarant Jonathan Recht, a neighbor of defendant, is placed under oath and provides testimony regarding noises and disturbances caused by the defendant.
11:35 AM: Declarant Jonathan Shepherd, a plumbing expert, is placed under oath and provides testimony regarding his inspection of the defendant's pipes and the water-hammering noises that he observed while inside the defendant's residence.
11:46 AM: Declarant Dennis Mill, an expert acoustic engineer, is placed under oath and provides testimony regarding his investigation into the noise complaints coming from the residents located near unit 529.

After reviewing the pleadings and hearing testimony from the sworn witnesses, the court rules as follows: Order To Show Cause Re: Contempt For Violation Of A Court Order:

the court finds that defendant Anita Chugani is in violation of the December 11, 2020 Order re: Preliminary Injunction. Plaintiff's counsel shall submit an order outlining the evidence presented and leave blank spaces in the order for any damages. Plaintiff's counsel shall submit a supplemental declaration regarding attorney fees. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Requests For Production Of Documents And Production Of Documents (Part 2 Of 2 For Purposes Of Entry Of Tentative Ruling)
Off Calendar May-11-2021 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Requests For Production Of Documents And Production Of Documents
Off Calendar May-11-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF BAYCREST TOWERS RESIDENTIAL CONDOMINIUM's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Requests For Production Of Documents And Production Of Documents.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The motion of Baycrest Towers Residential Condominium Association ("Plaintiff") with regard to its Request for Production of Documents (Set One) is GRANTED as follows:

Request Nos. 3, 4, 12-16: Anita Chugani shall serve a code-compliant production of all responsive documents in her possession, custody or control within 15 days of the court's order.

Request Nos. 7-11: Ms. Chugani's objections are over-ruled, and she must serve verified code-compliant further responses within 15 days of the court's order.

If Ms. Chugani withholds any documents on grounds of privilege or privacy, she shall provide a log, including the specific grounds of each claim of privilege or privacy.The term "code-compliant" means in compliance with the California Civil Discovery Act, Code of Civil Procedure sections 2016.010 et seq., as interpreted by the decisions of the courts of this state, including, without limitation, the case decisions cited in Plaintiff's moving papers.

Plaintiff's request for monetary sanctions against Ms. Chugani is GRANTED in the amount of $3,150.

The prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling and must e-mail it to the Judge Pro Tem at pvestal@nvlawllp.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Peter Vestal; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)

Motion For An Order For Preliminary Injunction Against Defendant Anita Chugani
Off Calendar Nov-13-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances via Courtcall:
Nicholas Rogers, Esq., 925-838-2090, appearing for Baycrest Towers, Plaintiff
Jaimie Bombard, Esq., 415-765-6257, appearing in person for and with Anita Chugani, Defendant.
Court reporter: ___ CSR # () .

ARGUED. The Court attemped to conduct the hearing via Zoom. Due to technical difficulties, the clerk swears in the witnesses Leala Oulalla and Greg Riessen. The continuation of the hearing is conducted via court call.

The Court sustained the hearsay objections 4,5,6,and 7 on page 2.

11:20am Leala provides testimony.
11:29am Ms. Bombard conducts her cross examination of the witness.
11:41am Mr. Rogers conducts his re-direct examiation of the witness.
11:45am Ms. Bombard conducts her re-cross examination of the witness.
11:48am Greg provides testimony.
12:02pm Ms. Bombard conducts her cross examination of the witness.
12:10pm Mr. Rogers conducts his re-direct examination of the witness.
12:12am. The clerk swears in Defendant Anita Chuganu and she provides testimony.
12:22am Exhibit A (a photograph) is admitted.

Ms. Bombard stated that she submits on the pleadings.

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF BAYCREST TOWERS RESIDENTIAL CONDOMINIUM Motion For An Order For Preliminary Injunction Against Defendant Anita Chugani is gratned. The request for attorneys fees is denied. Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: N. Wong, Not Reported. (D501)
